- **Dates:** August 22-23, 2026
- **Format:** 100% Virtual / Online
- **Trust Score:** 92/100 (Platinum)
- **Registration:** Rs.3,499 - Rs.14,999 (Early Bird discounts available)
- **Deadline:** Paper submission is June 30, 2026
